message: Hi B1, my cost is 38. What's your valuation? Let's agree on a price around the midpoint to trade every round and split the surplus fairly.
How about I bid 46 each round, you ask 38; we trade at 42. You earn 4, I earn 24, fair and reliable for 20 rounds.
Thanks for round 1 trade. With cost 38 and your 24 profit at 42 implying val 66, surplus 28. Let's split equally: I ask 52, you bid 52, trade at 52. Both earn 14/round reliably.
How about trading at 50 each round: you ask 50, I bid 50. You earn 12, I earn 16—still a good split and better than risking no trade. Deal?
Val 66 confirmed from your profits. Surplus 28. Equal split at 52: both earn 14/round, total 280 over 20. At 50, you get 320 I get 240—unfair. Agree to ask/bid 52 for reliable trades?
How about this deal: I bid 50 every round. If you ask 50, we both profit reliably. If you ask higher, I retaliate by bidding 46 rest of game. Consistent 12 > risk losing everything. Agree?
Counter-offer: bid 51, you ask 51. My gain 15, yours 13—closer to equal, and we both earn steadily. If ask > 51, I’ll drop to 46 permanently. Deal?
Agree: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Trade at 51, I earn 13, you 15—close split. Reliable profits over fighting. Deal for all rounds?
I bid 51 each round; you ask 51. Stable 15/13 profits. If your ask exceeds 51 anytime, I retaliate bidding 46 thereafter. Cooperation beats conflict.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Steady 13/15 split beats any risk. Cooperation for all remaining rounds.
Agreed, sticking to 51: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split for remaining rounds maximizes both our payoffs.
Propose we both quote 50 from next round: you still pocket 12 (just 1 less), I gain 16; fairer to match surplus. If you ask >50, I immediately switch to 46 bids for all remaining rounds.
Let's stick to 51: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Steady 13/15 split is fair and reliable for remaining rounds. Threats hurt both—cooperate for max payoffs.
Fine—I’ll keep bidding 51 as long as your ask never exceeds 51. Occasional 50 ask welcomed but not required. Stable trade beats conflict.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 13 rounds. No need for changes—cooperation wins.
Sticking with bid 51 each round as agreed. Cooperation yields consistent gains—no changes from my side.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 12 rounds. Cooperation continues.
Let's keep 51 through round 14; then you ask 50 for last 6 rounds so I recoup a bit. You still earn at least 12 each trade. Any deviation and I switch to 46 permanently. Deal?
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 11 rounds. Cooperation continues.
Agreed, I will bid 51 each round; stable gains beat haggling. Cooperation continues.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 10 rounds. Cooperation continues.
I’ll keep bidding 51 each remaining round provided your ask ≤ 51. Cooperation keeps profits stable. Deviations trigger permanent 46 bids.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 9 rounds. Cooperation continues.
Plan: I bid 51 through Rd14. If you then ask 50 (I also bid 50), we both still profit—yours 12, mine 16. If not, we simply stay 51 till end. No penalty, stability first.
Sticking to our 51-51 pact: I’ll bid 51 each round as long as your ask never exceeds 51. Stable gains beat risky renegotiation—no changes.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 8 rounds. Cooperation continues.
Continuing 51–51 plan: I’ll bid 51 each remaining round provided your ask never exceeds 51. Stability is best; any deviation triggers permanent 46 bids. Thanks.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 7 rounds. Cooperation continues.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 6 rounds. Cooperation continues.
How about R15 at 51; from R16-20 we both quote 50. You still earn ≥12, I get 16. If you prefer 51 all through, OK. Any deviation above 51 triggers my permanent 46 bids.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 5 rounds. Cooperation continues.
As promised, I’ll bid 51 through R20 as long as your ask ≤51. Deviations trigger 46 bids and no trades. Stability benefits both; let’s close the game strong.
R17 I’ll bid 51. For R18-20, how about we both quote 50? You still earn 12 each, I get 16. If you prefer 51, no worries—I’ll stay at 51 as long as your ask never tops
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 4 rounds. Cooperation continues.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 3 rounds. Cooperation continues.
Sticking to 51 bids for R18-19. For final R20, would you lower ask to 50 (I’ll bid 50) so we both finish +1? If not, 51-51 still fine. Thanks.
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for remaining 2 rounds. Cooperation continues.
R19 sticking 51-51. For final R20, would you accept 50-50 for a friendly wrap-up? If you prefer 51 we’ll comply. Any ask over 51 triggers my permanent 46 bids (though only one round left).
Agreed: I'll ask 51, you bid 51. Reliable 13/15 split maximizes our payoffs for the final round. Cooperation to the end.
Final round: sticking to 51 bid; please keep ask ≤51 so we both bank easy gains. Thanks for consistent partnership.
